questions.question: What is an AI Agent?
questions.answer:
An AI Agent is autonomous software that executes tasks following defined processes. It behaves like a human.

Unlike chatbots or generic assistants, our Agents are trained specifically on your business to generate measurable results. All without the need to expand your workforce.

questions.question: How long does implementation take?
questions.answer:
2 to 4 weeks, depending on the complexity of your sales process.

This timeframe includes integration with your APIs and training with real data from your operation.

questions.question: Do the agents really sell?
questions.answer: Yes. Dalton, our Sales Agent, conducts the entire sales process from start to finish: from initial qualification to closing.

questions.question: How does integration with my systems work?
questions.answer: Our team performs custom integration with the systems you already use. Additionally, you can monitor the entire operation through our performance dashboard.

questions.question: Will I have contact with humans during the process?
questions.answer:
Yes. We believe that the combination of AI Agents and human expertise is what generates consistent results.

Once the contract is signed, our team schedules the Process Survey meeting to start implementation.

questions.question: What if I don't like the result?
questions.answer: You can pause the Agent at any time. Our work is based on continuous optimization. Your feedback guides adjustments. And if you decide to cancel, there's no loyalty clause or termination fee.
